text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian MFA Spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei: We arrive in Islamabad, Pakistan, for an official visit. FM Araghchi will be meeting with Pakistani high-level officials in concert with their ongoing mediation & good offices for ending American imposed war of aggression and the restitution of peace in our region. No meeting is planned to take place between Iran and the U.S. Iran's observations would be conveyed to Pakistan. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：我们抵达巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡进行正式访问。阿拉格齐外长将与巴基斯坦高级官员会晤，配合他们正在进行的斡旋与调停工作，以结束美国强加的侵略战争并恢复我们地区的和平。目前没有计划举行伊朗与美国之间的会晤。伊朗的意见将转达给巴基斯坦。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical The USAF airbridge to the Middle East continued at full steam this evening, with a number of C-17s hopping over through Europe. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047810648008991059/video/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix Albanian State Propaganda going strong Many of our European allies don’t practice coercive diplomacy or believe in escalation dominance. They think you can bribe the Islamic Republic to give up its most deadly capabilities. My take on @FoxNews with @johnrobertsFox and @aishahhasnie. https://twitter.com/mdubowitz/status/2047766518507704731/video/1 - Mark Dubowitz tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 阿尔巴尼亚国家宣传攻势强劲。我们许多欧洲盟友并不实行强制外交，也不相信升级主导权。他们认为可以通过贿赂伊斯兰共和国来使其放弃最致命的能力。我在 @FoxNews 上与 @johnrobertsFox 和 @aishahhasnie 的谈话。 https://twitter.com/mdubowitz/status/2047766518507704731/video/1 - Mark Dubowitz 推文

text: OSINTdefender Argentina seems to have forgotten what happened the last time they attempted to seize the Falkland Islands from Britain. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047806014242607423/video/1 THE MALVINAS WERE, ARE, AND WILL ALWAYS BE ARGENTINE. LONG LIVE FREEDOM, DAMN IT! - Milei in English - Official Account tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 阿根廷似乎忘记了上次他们试图从英国手中夺取福克兰群岛时发生了什么。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047806014242607423/video/1 马尔维纳斯群岛过去、现在和将来永远是阿根廷的。自由万岁，该死的！ - 米莱英文官方账号 推文

text: Nuno Felix The great pronouncer of nonsense is back He will have a chance to lead the EU. But probably he is right- it would be better to leave all national or EU positions. - Mikhail Ulyanov tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 那个胡言乱语的伟大宣讲者回来了。他将有机会领导欧盟。但他可能说得对——最好还是离开所有国家或欧盟职位。 - 米哈伊尔·乌里扬诺夫 推文

text: WarMonitor A new Reuters/Ipsos poll finds 77% of Americans blame Trump for rising gas prices, including 55% of Republicans and 82% of independents. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047805282869481676/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump attacks right-wing podcaster and conspiracy theorist Candace Owens in a post on TruthSocial, calling her an “extremely Low IQ individual,” while including a fake cover of Time Magazine which labels her “Vile Person of the Year.” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047795436270879116/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在TruthSocial上发帖抨击右翼播客和阴谋论者坎迪斯·欧文斯，称她为“智商极低的人”，并附上了一张伪造的《时代》杂志封面，上面称她为“年度卑鄙人物”。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047795436270879116/photo/1 推文

text: Kash Patel, now head of the FBI, disclosed that he was arrested twice in his youth for alcohol-related incidents—once for underage public intoxication (2001) and once for public urination after leaving a bar (2005). He said both incidents were mistakes and not reflective of his usual behavior. Source: The Intercept
text_zh: 现任联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）披露，他年轻时曾因酒精相关事件被捕两次——一次是2001年因未成年公共场合醉酒，另一次是2005年离开酒吧后在公共场合随地小便。他表示这两次事件都是错误，并不能反映他平时的行为。来源：The Intercept

text: Some allies of Trump increasingly see Marco Rubio as a serious 2028 presidential contender. Once viewed as too establishment after his failed 2016 run, Rubio has gained support through his loyalty to Trump, active role in foreign policy, and stronger alignment with MAGA priorities. While JD Vance remains the frontrunner, Rubio’s polling numbers have risen and he’s now seen inside the White House as a viable alternative. Source: POLITICO
text_zh: 特朗普的一些盟友越来越将马可·鲁比奥（Marco Rubio）视为2028年总统大选的有力竞争者。鲁比奥在2016年竞选失败后曾被认为过于建制派，但通过对特朗普的忠诚、在外交政策中的积极作用以及与“让美国再次伟大”（MAGA）优先事项的更紧密结合，他赢得了支持。虽然万斯（JD Vance）仍是领跑者，但鲁比奥的民调数字有所上升，目前在白宫内部被视为一个可行的替代人选。来源：POLITICO

text: Trump: The first time Lafayette Park Fountains, opposite the White House, have worked in decades. My Great Honor to have funded this project (and many others!), and helped.
text_zh: 特朗普：白宫对面的拉斐特公园喷泉几十年来首次恢复工作。我很荣幸能资助这个项目（以及其他许多项目！），并提供了帮助。

text: Trump: Hakeem “High Tax” Jeffries is a Low IQ individual who is not smart enough to be “running” the Democrat Party, and certainly not smart enough to be involved in running the United States of America. It’s people like this who almost destroyed our Nation with their High Tax, Open Border Policies. In the future, Hakeem, a fine American name, will forever be known as HIGH TAX!
text_zh: 特朗普：哈基姆·“高税收”·杰弗里斯（Hakeem “High Tax” Jeffries）是一个低智商的人，他不够聪明，无法“管理”民主党，当然也不够聪明去参与管理美利坚合众国。正是这样的人，用他们的高税收和开放边境政策差点摧毁了我们的国家。未来，哈基姆这个美好的美国名字，将永远被称为“高税收”！

text: Trump: Candace Owens’ stock, which was never very high, has fallen a long way. Her attack on the First Lady of France is despicable. I believe, in this case, without verification, she is an extremely Low IQ individual!
text_zh: 特朗普：坎迪斯·欧文斯（Candace Owens）的声望本来就不高，现在更是跌入谷底。她对法国第一夫人的攻击是卑鄙的。我相信，在这种情况下，无需核实，她就是一个极低智商的人！

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : People choosing between gas and groceries don’t have “all the time in the world.” Hegseth: “We have all the time in the world, and we're not anxious for a deal” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2047659213049012429/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor转发 @TheWarMonitor：那些在购买汽油和购买杂货之间做选择的人可没有“全世界的时间”。赫格塞斯（Hegseth）：“我们有全世界的时间，我们并不急于达成协议” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2047659213049012429/video/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: WarMonitor Russian media says Trump is still a useful foreign policy asset for Moscow, but his value is declining and expected to drop further as the midterms approach. https://x.com/BBCSteveR/status/2047594971369488510/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 俄罗斯媒体称，特朗普对莫斯科来说仍然是一个有用的外交政策资产，但他的价值正在下降，预计随着中期选举的临近，其价值还会进一步下跌。https://x.com/BBCSteveR/status/2047594971369488510/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump calls Candace Owens "an extremely Low IQ individual!" Posting a fake magazine cover with Candace as Time's "Vile Person of the Year." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047794933503771070/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普称坎迪斯·欧文斯为“一个极低智商的人！”并发布了一张伪造的杂志封面，将坎迪斯列为《时代》周刊的“年度卑劣人物”。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047794933503771070/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Traders on Polymarket remain skeptical about further changes in Iranian leadership by the end of the year, despite reports that Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei continues to suffer from serious injuries he sustained during initial strikes during the Iran War and repeated threats by both Israel and the United States. Chances that Mojtaba is removed from power by December 31, 2026, currently sit at roughly 40%. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 尽管有报道称伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）在伊朗战争初期的袭击中受了重伤，且以色列和美国多次发出威胁，但Polymarket的交易员们对伊朗领导层在年底前发生进一步变动仍持怀疑态度。莫杰塔巴在2026年12月31日前被免职的可能性目前约为40%。推文

text: WarMonitor A law meant for national defense is now being stretched to rescue a budget airline. Scoop: Trump administration is exploring using the Defense Production Act as part of a strategy to save the beleaguered Spirit Airlines, sources told @olivialarinaldi and me. @CBSNews https://www.cbsnews.com/news/white-house-mulls-using-defense-production-act-in-spirit-airlines-takeover/ - Jennifer Jacobs tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一项旨在国防的法律现在正被延伸用于拯救一家廉价航空公司。独家报道：消息人士告诉 @olivialarinaldi 和我，特朗普政府正在探索利用《国防生产法》作为拯救陷入困境的精神航空（Spirit Airlines）战略的一部分。@CBSNews https://www.cbsnews.com/news/white-house-mulls-using-defense-production-act-in-spirit-airlines-takeover/ - 詹妮弗·雅各布斯（Jennifer Jacobs）推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesman: No meeting is planned to take place between Iran and the U.S. Any communication will be relayed by Pakistan. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗外交部发言人：伊朗和美国之间没有计划举行任何会议。任何沟通都将通过巴基斯坦转达。推文

text: OSINTdefender A U.S. Air Force KC-46A Pegasus, likely supporting fighter or strike aircraft, is currently operating over the Persian Gulf off the coast of the United Arab Emirates, following today’s statement by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth that American forces have been authorized to “shoot and kill” any Iranian fast-attack boats laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 一架美国空军KC-46A飞马加油机（可能正在支援战斗机或攻击机）目前正在阿拉伯联合酋长国海岸外的波斯湾上空作业。此前，国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）今天发表声明称，美军已获授权“开枪击毙”任何在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的伊朗快速攻击艇。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 IRNA: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad to discuss regional developments. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Baqaei says that no meetings between Iranian and U.S. officials are planned during Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi’s visit to Pakistan. Instead Iran plans to convey their observations to Pakistani mediators. @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Over 70% of Americans report struggling to cover essentials like food, housing, and healthcare, according to a CBS News poll. https://x.com/CBSMornings/status/2047679586884780185/video/1 tweet

text: Reporter: What will France do if Greek sovereignty is challenged in the Aegean? Macron: If your sovereignty is at risk, do what you have to do for you. We will be here.
text_zh: 记者：如果希腊在爱琴海的主权受到挑战，法国将采取什么行动？马克龙：如果你们的主权受到威胁，那就做你们必须做的事。我们会在这里支持你们。

text: ⚡️ ☀️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 The PUK aligned Kurdistan Region Counter‑Terrorism Directorate (CTG) has rejected media reports claiming that weapons shown in a video – allegedly destined for Iran – are under its control. The directorate stated that the weapons appear to be Russian Grad missiles, not American, and that even if they were American, it would be normal for CTG as a long‑standing US ally in the fight against terrorism. The statement accused the circle of Kurdistan Region Prime Minister Masrour Barzani of fabricating the story to cover up scandals involving his brothers, who are under U.S. investigation for alleged bribery and fraud related to Pentagon contracts. “Neither a large shipment of weapons nor even a needle would appear in this region without Masrour being responsible,” the CTG said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 库尔德斯坦地区反恐局（CTG，隶属于库尔德斯坦爱国联盟）否认了媒体关于一段视频中展示的武器（据称运往伊朗）受其控制的报道。该局表示，这些武器看起来是俄罗斯的“冰雹”导弹，而非美国武器；即便它们是美国武器，作为美国在反恐斗争中的长期盟友，CTG拥有这些武器也是正常的。声明指责库尔德斯坦地区总理马斯鲁尔·巴尔扎尼的圈子编造了这个故事，以掩盖其兄弟涉及的丑闻，后者正因涉嫌与五角大楼合同有关的贿赂和欺诈而受到美国调查。CTG表示：“如果没有马斯鲁尔的负责，这个地区连一大批武器甚至一根针都不会出现。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF reports they destroyed Hezbollah rockets launchers in the Yatar and Kafraya areas north of the forward defence line. Earlier today, Hezbollah launched several explosive drones toward Israeli forces operating in southern Lebanon. The drones reportedly exploded near the troops, with no casualties reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军报告称，他们摧毁了前沿防御线以北亚塔尔（Yatar）和卡夫拉亚（Kafraya）地区的真主党火箭发射器。今天早些时候，真主党向在黎巴嫩南部行动的以色列军队发射了几架爆炸无人机。据报道，无人机在部队附近爆炸，没有人员伤亡报告。 @wfwitness

text: Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: The combination of AI and robotics, at the scale at which it is happening in China, is a colossal threat to our entire manufacturing sector — not just the sectors where the Chinese are competing now.
text_zh: 希腊总理基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯：人工智能与机器人技术的结合，以目前在中国发生的速度，对我们整个制造业构成了巨大的威胁——不仅仅是目前中国正在竞争的领域。

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf is giving "trading advice" again. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫又在提供“交易建议”了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: We have the opportunity to look beyond what is happening within Europe and to establish new strong alliances, which will create de facto a more multipolar world.
text_zh: 希腊总理基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯：我们有机会超越欧洲内部正在发生的事情，建立新的强大联盟，这将事实上创造一个更加多极化的世界。

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | The seized Iranian “TOSKA” ship by the US Navy carried dialysis supplies and vital medical equipment for Iranian civilians. Before, the US claimed its blockade would not seize/stop ships that transported food or medical equipment, well that turns out to be an outright lie. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | 美国海军扣押的伊朗“TOSKA”号货轮上载有为伊朗平民提供的透析用品和重要医疗设备。此前，美国声称其封锁行动不会扣押/阻止运输食品或医疗设备的船只，事实证明这完全是彻头彻尾的谎言。 @FotrosResistancee

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | Iran’s FM will NOT meet with Kushner & Witkoff, that says Iran’s MFA to Reuters. Araghchi's trip will be short and aims to review Iran's proposals for negotiations with the US; proposals that Pakistan, as a mediator, will convey to Washington. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | 伊朗外交部向路透社表示，伊朗外交部长将不会与库什纳和威特科夫会面。阿拉格齐此行将很短暂，旨在审查伊朗与美国谈判的提议；这些提议将由巴基斯坦作为调解人传达给华盛顿。 @FotrosResistancee

text: French President Macron: What we should avoid is to rush into any decoupling strategy with China, because the result will be to increase our dependency on the US and to be seen by the rest of the world as just vassals of the US — which is not our future.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙：我们应该避免仓促采取任何与中国“脱钩”的战略，因为其结果将是增加我们对美国的依赖，并被世界其他地区视为美国的附庸——这不是我们的未来。

text: French President Macron on NATO: There is now a doubt on Article 5 — not put on the table by the Europeans, but by the US president — and it’s clearly de facto weakening the strength of the alliance.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙谈北约：现在对第五条款存在怀疑——这不是由欧洲人提出的，而是由美国总统提出的——这实际上削弱了联盟的力量。

text: WarMonitor Priorities... Trump will attend an RNC Spring Retreat and speak at a memecoin conference during his brief stay in Florida. https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2047774336564543757/photo/1 - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 优先事项……特朗普在佛罗里达州短暂停留期间，将参加共和党全国委员会春季务虚会，并在一个模因币会议上发表讲话。 https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2047774336564543757/photo/1 - Faytuks Network 推文

text: Open Source Intel The tornado in Enid, Oklahoma has been rated EF-4, officials say. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047778858057798009/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：官员称，俄克拉荷马州伊尼德的龙卷风已被评定为 EF-4 级。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047778858057798009/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Tehran says discussions with the U.S. aren’t on the table right now. Trump tells Reuters that Iran is making an offer to the US aimed at satisfying American demands. "They're making an offer and we'll have to see" - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：德黑兰表示，目前并未考虑与美国进行讨论。特朗普告诉路透社，伊朗正在向美国提出一项旨在满足美国要求的提议。“他们正在提出建议，我们拭目以待” - Faytuks Network 推文
